The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #3817) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Closing this for now, possibly temporarily, to work on more important items.  May re-open in the future as priorities dictate.
